{{CargoRelic
|name=Bach Concerto
|rank=Blue
|affct=ART
|birthday=02-12
|source=Lottery Machine (0.03%), Wishing (1.2%), Club Chest (2%)<br>[[Lee Gi-na]] - [[Partners#Rent_List|normal rent]]
|description=On Feb 12, 1721, Bach composed the greatest concerto in the history of music. Bach was invited to compose a piece for Christian, the Margraviate of Brandenburg. Instead of following traditional composition style of putting a group of similar solo instruments together, he used different solo instruments. Using all musical instruments possible, Bach involved 7 instruments even for the shortest No. 6 prelude. Unfortunately, the sextet of Brandenburg was unable to play this concerto due to the lack of musicians.
|fame=32
|art=46
|fth=30
|civ=24
|tech=22
|ss1=Green Bead draws give +1 Lucky Voucher by +5%
|ss2=Green Bead draws give +1 Lucky Voucher by +10%
|ss3=Green Bead draws give +1 Lucky Voucher by +15%
|ss4=Green Bead draws give +1 Lucky Voucher by +25%
|ss7=Green Bead draws give +1 Lucky Voucher by +25%<br>Green Bead draws give +1 Lucky Voucher by +25% (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Tadpolepond skill I.png|50px]] Place in Tadpole Pond: Generate W-tads by +5%
}}

[[Category:Relics]]
[[Category:Blue Relics]]
[[Category:ART Relics]]
[[Category:Blue ART Relics]]
[[Category:Tadpole Pond Skill]]
[[Category:Tadpole Pond W-Tad Output Boost]]
[[Category:Enhanced by Lottery Draws]]
[[Category:Lucky Voucher Boost]]
[[Category:ATK Boost]]
